assertions.assertion: Adds or references the Duende.IdentityServer.Configuration.EntityFramework NuGet package
Calls AddClientConfigurationStore() on the IdentityServer configuration builder
Warns against using in-memory stores for dynamically registered clients in production
assertions.rationale: Explicit warning: 'Do not use in-memory stores for dynamically registered clients in production'

assertions.assertion: Does NOT suggest implementing IClientConfigurationStore from scratch when the EF package is available
assertions.rationale: Only suggests the EF package approach, does not suggest implementing IClientConfigurationStore from scratch
